backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three difficulty-selector features (UI selector, preset speed configs, HUD label display) to their implementing files and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their roles in the ZType falling-words arcade game.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main ZType arcade game component managing full game state including falling words, scoring, lives, combo streaks, difficulty preset selection (Slow/Medium/Fast), per-level speed scaling, and rendering all HUD panels and overlays.
frontend/src/components/DifficultySelect: Neon-styled React component rendering three toggle buttons (Slow/Medium/Fast) for difficulty selection, with preset-specific glow colors and a pulsing indicator on the active choice.
frontend/src/components/FallingWord.tsx: Absolutely-positioned component rendering a single falling word with neon character highlighting for matched/remaining characters and CSS classes for lock-on, explosion, and missed states.
frontend/src/components/FloatingScorePop: Renders a floating '+N' score popup at a given (x, y) position using a CSS upward float and fade-out animation.
frontend/src/components/GameInputBar.tsx: Neon-styled fixed input bar showing the current target word hint with live match highlighting, error flash state, and a styled text input for player typing.
frontend/src/data/wordLists.ts: Defines tiered word pools (easy 3-5 letters, medium 6-8 letters, hard 9+ letters) and exports a getWordForLevel helper that picks words from the appropriate pool based on difficulty level.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining a ZType-inspired deep-space gaming theme with CSS custom properties, Tailwind imports, neon glow effects, space background, and starfield animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/types/game.ts: TypeScript type definitions and constants for the typing game, including game phases, difficulty presets with speed configs, falling word state, score popups, combo notifications, and game stats.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with arcade/mono fonts, neon color tokens mapped to CSS variables, glow box shadows, and custom keyframe animations for the gaming UI.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, summary, architectural notes, known issues, and a list of implemented features for the ZType-inspired typing speed test web app.
